headline: Assessing Dow (DOW) Valuation After Project Delays And European Asset Review
summary: Recent performance snapshot Dow (DOW) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch for the stock, with a fall of about 2.1% over the past day and 4.3% over the past week, along with gains over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Dow. Set against a recent pullback, Dow’s 30-day share price return of 6.01% and 90-day share price return of 19.51% sit alongside a 1-year total shareholder return of 35.26%. However, the 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns show...

headline: Synergis Software Launches Adept Cloud, a Cloud-Native Engineering Document Management Platform Built for Asset-Intensive Industries
summary: Synergis Software announced the general availability of Adept Cloud, a cloud-native SaaS engineering document management platform built for organizations in manufacturing, utilities, oil and gas, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and mining — where the accuracy of engineering documentation is a matter of operational safety, regulatory compliance, and project outcomes. headline: Hitchhiker Commodities: The Supply Chains Nobody Owns
summary: A hidden set of byproduct materials powers modern life, and their supply depends entirely on decisions made for other industries. Read more here.
